---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component, workflow, or case study
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

One paragraph describing the addition or change.

## Why it's in scope

Reference `CONTRIBUTING.md` — which scope category does this fit into?

- [ ] New stack component (solves a real problem the current six don't)
- [ ] New workflow (solo / small-team operator)
- [ ] New case study (your own shipped product, anonymized)
- [ ] Translation of existing content
- [ ] Better installer / tooling
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## What it replaces or augments

Existing thing this would change, or "new addition."

## Are you offering to contribute the work?

- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR
- [ ] Yes — but I'd need design review first
- [ ] No — just suggesting
